name: Topher AI — Web Widget Call Intake

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "from": $vars.SMS_FROM_NUMBER,
  "to":   $vars.ADMIN_PHONE,
  "text": "🔥 HOT LEAD — Web Widget Call

Name: " + ($json.name || 'Unknown') + "
Phone: " + ($json.phone || 'Not provided') + "
Email: " + ($json.email || 'Not provided') + "
Industry: " + $json.industry + "
Inquiry: " + $json.inquiry + "
Score: " + $json.score_reason + "
Booked: " + ($json.booked ? 'YES ✅' : 'No') + "
Duration: " + Math.round(($json.durationSecs||0)/60) + "m " + (($json.durationSecs||0)%60) + "s"
} }}

parameters.subject: =🔥 Hot Lead — Web Widget Call: {{ $json.name || 'Unknown Visitor' }}
parameters.html:
={{ '
' + '
' + '

🔥 Hot Lead — Web Widget

' + '
' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
Name' + ($json.name||'Not captured') + '
Phone' + ($json.phone||'Not provided') + '
Email' + ($json.email||'Not provided') + '
Industry' + $json.industry + '
Inquiry' + $json.inquiry + '
ScoreHOT 🔥
Reason' + $json.score_reason + '
Booked' + ($json.booked?'YES ✅':'Not yet') + '
' + '
' + '

Transcript

' + '

' + ($json.transcript||'').slice(0,800) + ($json.transcript&&$json.transcript.length>800?'...':'') + '

' + '
' + 'View Dashboard' + '
' }}
